sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_modulo (a Int32, b Int32, result Int32) ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY a;
INSERT INTO test_modulo (a, b, result) VALUES (-1, 10, positiveModulo(-1, 10));
UPDATE test_modulo SET result = positiveModulo(a, b) WHERE a < 0;
SELECT a, b, positiveModulo(a, b) AS modulo_result FROM test_modulo;
SELECT a, b, positiveModulo(positiveModulo(a, b), 5) AS nested_result FROM test_modulo;
